## Description

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Submit '...'
3. See error

What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- Docker version: [e.g. 24.0.5]
- GPU: [e.g. NVIDIA RTX 3090, or N/A]
- Affected service: [e.g. md, docking, gateway]
